titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Saul Steinberg Foundation Records

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Wednesday November 22, 2023 at 04:01

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.
Box 5 (record album): Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Boxes 33-34 (audiovisual material): Restricted fragile: Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Boxes 35-39 (born digital): Restricted fragile: Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of the Saul Steinberg Foundation, 2022.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into two groupings: I. January 2018 acquisition, 1940-2006. II. June 2022 acquisition, 1937-2015.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Saul Steinberg Foundation Records. Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Saul Steinberg Foundation Records include materials related to the Saul Steinberg Foundation, as well as Saul Steinberg's life and work, including published versions of artworks, writings, publications, correspondence, photographs, slides, research files, clippings, audiovisual materials, born digital materials, realia, and other papers.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Saul Steinberg Foundation Records is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This accession primarily contains publications that include artwork or writings created by, or relating to, Saul Steinberg.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 5 (record album): Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of the Saul Steinberg Foundation, 2022.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 5 (record album): Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Materials in this series are arranged chronologically by publication date, with undated materials collected at the end.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series is primarily comprised of magazines that contain published artwork by Saul Steinberg, along with related artwork and clippings.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Audiovisual material: Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 33-34 (audiovisual material): Restricted fragile: Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Boxes 35-39 (born digital): Restricted fragile: Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of the Saul Steinberg Foundation, 2022.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged into three series: I. Professional papers, 1937-2015. II. Audiovisual material, 1967-2001. III. Computer media, 2005-2007.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This accession primarily contains artwork, publications, catalogs, exhibition material, correspondence, photographic prints, slides, clippings, audiovisual material, born-digital material, ephemera, and other paper materials related to the work of Saul Steinberg.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 35 (born digital): Restricted fragile: Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into four groupings: Artwork, 1937-1999; Catalogs, publications, and exhibitions, 1945-2015; Photographic prints and slides, 1949-2003; and Clippings, 1952-2008.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains artwork, publication and exhibition catalogs, photographic prints and slides, and clippings related to the life and work of Saul Steinberg.

did.unittitle: The New Yorker drawings, Françoise Mouly
Pistachio nuts container used in Saul Steinberg's still lifes

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 35 (born digital): Restricted fragile: Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: "Millor-Steinberg Fiasco", catalog, copies of correspondence, and blank notebook
Reviews of Diedre Bair's biography on Saul Steinberg
Original transcriptions of the Lettere sent to Saul Steinberg

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, brochures, calendars, notes, computer media and other related paper material.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 35 (born digital): Restricted fragile: Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Institut Valencia d'Art Modern - Exposicion: Saul Steinberg, exhibition brochure
Museum of the City of N. Y.
Brochures, correspondence, and related paper materials

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

accessrestrict.p: Restricted fragile material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: "Steinberg a Milano", Politecnico di Milano, miscellany
Institute Valencia d' Art Modern, installation shots of Steinberg exhibition in booklet
Long Island house studio, photographic prints
American Export Lines, Inc., artist identification, photographic album
PACE, notebook of slides, in-laid slides and correspondence

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Boxes 33-34 (audiovisual material): Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains audiovisual materials related to Saul Steinberg's life and work.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Audiovisual material: Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
